## Summary

Describe in 2-4 lines what this PR changes.

## Change type

- [ ] Didactic content
- [ ] HTML/structure
- [ ] CSS/style
- [ ] JS core (navigation, progress, language)
- [ ] Interactive widgets
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Bug fix

## Affected modules or areas

Example: Module 04 Tape, Module 11 Input/Resampling, Sidebar, etc.

## Quality checklist

- [ ] Does not break module navigation
- [ ] Does not introduce duplicated sections
- [ ] HTML IDs are unique
- [ ] ES/EN/JA structure stays aligned (modules, anchors, widgets)
- [ ] Interactive labels are consistent (`pieza interactiva` / `Interactive module`) and paired correctly with real widgets
- [ ] Optional guided exercise labels are not presented as real interactive widgets
- [ ] Any OP-1 shortcuts/claims are verified or clearly framed as practical approximations
- [ ] Keeps the didactic and action-oriented style
- [ ] Keeps terminology consistent (`OP-1 Field`, `Tape`, `LFO`, `Mixer`, `Input`, `Resampling`)
- [ ] Ran `npm run qa` locally
- [ ] Tested on desktop
- [ ] Tested on mobile (if applicable)

## Evidence

Add screenshots, gif, or validation notes if applicable.

## Notes for reviewers

Anything specific you want reviewers to focus on?
